rulings.Case Title: MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL VS. MAXIMUS 620 OWNER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, 2019 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP, EJC FOLSOM LLC DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on April 9, 2019 Cross-Complainant file a supplemental brief (1) stating exactly how the benefit was conferred, e.g. mistake, fraud, coercion, etc.; response to this question shall not include any argument or fact, just a statement of the legal theory underlying the unjust enrichment; (2) list all factual allegations supporting the theory listed in section 1; (3) list all factual allegations supporting a claim that the benefit was conferred and is being retained by the Cross-Defendant, including in light of Paragraph 4.3 of PSA. No further argument is authorized. The brief shall be limited to facts that may be alleged in good faith if leave to amend is granted. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM HWONG ET AL VS. DENISE J. BOOKER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT DENISE BOOKER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession GRANTED. Defendant to immediately, no later than noon on April 9, 2019, remit full order-compliant payment to the landlord, along with any other payments that have become due under the stipulation since the issuance of the writ. No sanctions per CCP 473(c) granted (this time). = (501/CFH)
